warnings: SAP domain types mapped to standard VARCHAR/DATE/TIME - actual field lengths may need adjustment based on specific domain definitions
assumptions: Standard SAP domain type lengths used for VARCHAR mappings
mandt assumed as VARCHAR(3) for client field
kunnr assumed as VARCHAR(10) for customer number
Date fields (erdat, aedat, sydatum) mapped to DATE type
Time field (syuzeit) mapped to TIME type
User fields (ernam, syuname) mapped to VARCHAR(12)
conversion_notes: Converted composite primary key from SAP 'key' fields to Snowflake PRIMARY KEY constraint
Mapped SAP domain types to closest Snowflake equivalents
Preserved NOT NULL constraints on key fields
